stories.title: Power outages hit France as it records hottest day since measurements began
stories.summary: France has recorded it hottest day since records began in 1947, its national weather agency says, breaking a record set on Tuesday.

stories.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
stories.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

stories.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
stories.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

stories.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
stories.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

stories.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
stories.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

stories.title: France confirms first Ebola case
stories.summary: The French doctor had been working in DR Congo, where more than 260 people are known to have died.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
stories.summary: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.

stories.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
stories.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil, offering Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.

stories.title: Struggling to find a job? Try looking in Nevada
stories.summary: The sparsely populated state known for its world-class casinos and dry climate has been a hiring hot spot.

stories.title: Hormuz relief may not ease the economic toll that's already 'baked in,' analysts warn
stories.summary: Early signs of reopening of the Strait of Hormuz have lifted the most acute threat to global energy supplies but economic damages from the war will take months to unwind.

stories.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
stories.summary: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.

stories.title: Bank of England holds interest rates at 3.75% amid Iran war peace prospects
stories.summary: The Bank of England's Monetary Policy Committee voted 7-2 to keep rates on hold.

stories.title: Military branches restore flu shot requirement after virus swept through base
stories.summary: Branches received exceptions to Hegseth's policy that made the shot optional.
